content:
You are analyzing a failed attempt to set up and run tests for a project.
Your goal is to provide a DETAILED and COMPREHENSIVE summary that will help the next attempt succeed.

## PROJECT CONTEXT
- Project URL: https://github.com/hyperledger-indy/indy-node
- Project Path: /Users/alisonteske/cs/thesis/execution-agent-test/indy-node-test-build/indy-node
- Total cycles executed: 21

## DOCKERFILE USED (if any)
```dockerfile
FROM ubuntu:18.04

ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV TZ=Europe/Berlin

# Install git and gnupg separately first
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y git gnupg

# Add Hyperledger repository keys
RUN apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys 9692C00E657DDE61

# Add Ruby PPA
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y software-properties-common && \
    add-apt-repository ppa:brightbox/ruby-ng --yes

# Install Ruby and related tools before other dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    wget apt-transport-https ca-certificates apt-utils curl jq \
    python3 python3-pip python3-nacl python3-dev \
    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
    build-essential zstd ruby ruby-dev

# Install Ruby gems needed for the project
RUN gem install --no-document rake dotenv:2.8.1 fpm:1.14.2

# Installing packaging module
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir packaging

# Install setuptools first
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U setuptools==50.3.2

# Install other Python packages
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Move ursa libs if the directory exists.
RUN if [ -d /usr/lib/ursa ]; then mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa; fi

# Clean apt caches
RUN apt-get -y autoremove && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]
```

## DETAILED ACTION SEQUENCE
The following actions were taken in order:

**Setup Details**: Relevant dependencies: Python3, pip, setuptools==50.3.2, pyzmq==22.3.0, Cython==0.29.36, ZeroMQ development libraries (libzmq), and a C compiler.
Important commands: Ensure C compiler is installed, check installation of ZeroMQ >= 3.2, and rebuild ld cache if necessary using `sudo ldconfig`.

    libgflags-dev libsnappy-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \

# Install setuptools first

# Install other Python packages
RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir -U 'pyzmq==22.3.0' Cython==0.29.36

# Move ursa libs if the directory exists.
RUN if [ -d /usr/lib/ursa ]; then mv /usr/lib/ursa/* /usr/lib && rm -rf /usr/lib/ursa; fi

# Install fpm packaging gems

# Clean apt caches

# Clone project
WORKDIR /app
ARG REPO_URL
RUN test -n "$REPO_URL" && git clone --depth 1 "$REPO_URL" indy_node

# Set working directory to the project
WORKDIR /app/indy_node

# Install project dependencies
RUN pip --cache-dir /root/.cache/pip install .[tests]

CMD ["/bin/bash"]"}
